vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/auto-start
vBRIEFInfo.description: Auto-synthesized minimal plan for PAN-1799: Codex-harness work agent spawns die within seconds of boot; pan start then hangs indefinitely waiting on the dead session

plan.title: Codex-harness work agent spawns die within seconds of boot; pan start then hangs indefinitely waiting on the dead session
plan.author: panopticon-cli/auto-start

narratives.Problem:
Observed 2026-06-12 03:45–03:55 during a fleet restart, twice on PAN-1704 (`pan start PAN-1704 --model gpt-5.5 --harness codex --fresh --force`):

1. Spawn reports success (`✔ Agent spawned: agent-pan-1704`, harness codex, model gpt-5.5), with a warning during boot: `Codex: rollout did not appear within 30s — thread-id not captured`.
2. Lifecycle log: `starting → running` at 07:54:44Z, then `running → stopped (orphaned: tmux session missing at boot)` at **07:54:57Z** — the tmux session vanished 13 seconds after spawn.
3. The parent `pan start` process then hung indefinitely (>20 min) and had to be killed, wedging the whole sequential fleet-restart behind it.

Contrast: codex-harness **conversations** worked fine the same night (three successful handoff sessions, conv 2774/2776). The failure is specific to the work-agent spawn path (launcher.sh + kickoff delivery + thread-id capture for codex TUI agents).

Suspects: the codex TUI exiting when the rollout/thread-id capture fails; the work-agent kickoff delivery path not codex-aware (related: PAN-1793 pi delivery, PAN-1789 codex status tracking); or launcher env (the work launcher exports CLIProxy ANTHROPIC_* vars — fine for claude-code, possibly confusing for codex).

Impact: the gpt-5.5+codex work-agent pairing — the built-in default for OpenAI models once PAN-1787 lands — cannot boot at all. This blocks PAN-1787's own implementation value and tonight's fleet rebalancing. Also fix the secondary bug: `pan start` must fail fast (bounded wait) when the spawned session dies, not hang.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---
